name: Back to Nature Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Pennsylvania State Beekeepers Association
In a large mixing bowl, cream the shortening and honey until fluffy. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract. In a separate medium bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the honey mixture, beating until combined. Fold in the chopped nuts, raisins, and finely chopped apple. Form into cookies and place on ungreased baking sheets. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes or until lightly golden. Allow to cool on wire racks.
